analysis_metadata.paper_title: Cross-section measurements for the production of a W-boson in association with high-transverse-momentum jets in pp collisions at sqrt(s) = 13 TeV with the ATLAS detector
analysis_metadata.notes: Run 2 proton-proton collision data recorded from 2015 to 2018; measurement combines electron and muon channels after separate unfolding.

analysis_objectives.target_process: pp -> W(-> l nu) + jets with at least one jet of pT > 500 GeV
parameter_of_interest: differential cross-sections versus DeltaRmin(l,jet100), pT_lv/pT_closestjet, mjj, leading-jet pT, pT_lv, jet multiplicity, ST
analysis_objectives.description: Measure inclusive and differential W+jets production in a boosted jet regime, emphasizing collinear W emission from high-pT jets and high-multiplicity topologies.
analysis_objectives.special_considerations: Results are unfolded to particle level and compared with Sherpa 2.2.11, MadGraph5_aMC@NLO+Pythia8, and fixed-order MCFM W+1j@NNLO predictions.

analysis_objectives.description: Probe the phase space where dijet events radiate a W boson or where W+multi-jet production dominates, to test higher-order QCD and electroweak predictions.
analysis_objectives.special_considerations: Collinear region is defined by DeltaRmin(l,jet100) < 2.6; back-to-back region by the inverted requirement.

signal_signatures.decay_chain: pp -> W(-> e nu or mu nu) + jets
final_state_objects: exactly one isolated electron or muon
zero b-tagged jets at reconstruction level
signal_signatures.event_topology_description: Events contain a leptonic W decay recoiling against at least one very high-pT central jet; the angular distance between the lepton and the closest jet with pT > 100 GeV distinguishes back-to-back W+1 jet topologies from collinear W emission and W+multi-jet topologies.
signal_signatures.special_considerations: Particle-level fiducial region removes the reconstruction-level b-jet veto to remain inclusive in jet flavour; dressed leptons include photons within DeltaR = 0.1.

background_processes.special_treatment: Normalization extracted from a ttbar control region with >=2 b-tagged jets and parameterized versus jet multiplicity; extra mjj modeling uncertainty applied above 1 TeV.
background_processes.notes: Prompt-lepton background contributing up to about 8% of total expected yield across regions.

background_processes.special_treatment: Normalization extracted from a Z+jets control region with exactly two same-flavour opposite-sign leptons and 60 < mll < 120 GeV, parameterized versus jet multiplicity; extra mjj modeling uncertainty applied.
background_processes.notes: Main contribution comes from one lepton failing acceptance/selection or being misidentified as a jet in the signal region.

background_processes.special_treatment: Normalization extracted from control regions where the lepton fails impact-parameter or isolation requirements; parameterized in lepton pT and |eta|. Checked in a low-ETmiss validation region with no extra uncertainty assigned.
background_processes.notes: Largest in the electron back-to-back region, reaching up to about 20%.
Sub-dominant, expected up to about 2-3% depending on lepton flavor.

background_processes.special_treatment: EW W+jj is treated as a background and subtracted from data before unfolding; can contribute up to about 10% for large mjj in the inclusive-2 jet region.
background_processes.notes: Interference with QCD-induced vector-boson processes is neglected.

background_processes.special_treatment: Included in stacked signal-plus-background comparison as a background-like process distinct from the main electron/muon signal definition.
background_processes.notes: Present in event-yield tables for all signal regions.

signal_regions.selection_summary: Exactly one trigger-matched electron or muon with pT > 30 GeV, no additional leptons, >=1 jet with pT > 30 GeV and |y| < 2.5, DeltaR(l,jet) > 0.4, leading jet pT > 500 GeV, and b-jet veto.
signal_regions.fit_observable: inclusive fiducial event yield and unfolded differential distributions
signal_regions.optimization_strategy: Target boosted W+jets phase space with at least one very high-pT jet.
signal_regions.special_considerations: Electron and muon channels are unfolded separately before combination.

signal_regions.optimization_strategy: Require a second jet to access dijet kinematics in the boosted regime.
signal_regions.purpose: Measure invariant mass of the highest-momentum jet pair and a dedicated inclusive 2-jet fiducial cross-section.
signal_regions.special_considerations: mjj is particularly sensitive to modeling issues above the TeV scale.

signal_regions.selection_summary: Inclusive selection plus DeltaRmin(l,jet100) < 2.6, where jet100 denotes jets with pT > 100 GeV.
signal_regions.fit_observable: unfolded cross-sections versus leading-jet pT, pT_lv, jet multiplicity, ST, and collinear-sensitive observables
signal_regions.optimization_strategy: Enhance topologies with W emission close to a high-pT jet and W+>=2 jet configurations.
signal_regions.purpose: Probe the collinear enhancement region and multi-jet dynamics.
signal_regions.special_considerations: This is the phase space most sensitive to real W emission from dijet events.

signal_regions.fit_observable: inclusive fiducial event yield and DeltaRmin / pT_lv/pT_closestjet distributions
signal_regions.optimization_strategy: Select topologies dominated by leading-order W+1 jet production with the W recoiling against the jet.
signal_regions.purpose: Reference region complementary to the collinear phase space.
signal_regions.special_considerations: Events are expected to peak near pT_lv/pT_closestjet ~ 1 and large lepton-jet separations.

control_regions.selection_summary: Same as inclusive region except replace the b-jet veto with a requirement of at least two b-tagged jets.
control_regions.justification: Creates >80% ttbar purity while staying kinematically close to the signal region.
control_regions.special_considerations: Normalization factor set to unity with 10% uncertainty for the 1-jet bin because the contribution there is very small.

control_regions.selection_summary: Same as inclusive region except require exactly two same-flavour opposite-sign leptons with 60 < mll < 120 GeV instead of exactly one lepton.
control_regions.justification: Produces approximately 90% Z+jets purity with similar kinematics to the signal region.
control_regions.special_considerations: Jet counting in the signal region excludes misidentified jets matched to generator-level Z-decay electrons to match the control-region definition.

control_regions.selection_summary: Same phase space as each signal region, but the lepton must fail either impact-parameter or isolation requirements.
control_regions.fit_observable: background normalization versus lepton pT and |eta|
control_regions.justification: Produces >80% multijet purity and captures detector- and momentum-dependent fake-lepton composition.
control_regions.special_considerations: Derived separately in each signal-region phase space.

control_regions.selection_summary: Lepton satisfies signal criteria but missing transverse momentum is below 100 GeV.
control_regions.fit_observable: observed-versus-predicted distributions for all measured observables
control_regions.justification: Validation region where multijet background exceeds half the yield, used to validate the fake estimate.
control_regions.special_considerations: Has about 8% overlap with the measurement signal region.

fit_setup.fit_purpose: Combine separately unfolded electron and muon cross-sections into averaged fiducial measurements.
parameters_of_interest: combined fiducial cross-section in each signal region
fit_setup.differences_between_fit_versions: Electron and muon channels are first unfolded separately; then a chi2 likelihood fit using the Combiner package combines the channels with most systematics correlated, lepton-specific and multijet uncertainties partially uncorrelated.
fit_setup.special_considerations: This is a measurement combination rather than a signal-strength extraction fit.

results.dominant_uncertainties: Background modelling, JES/JER, b-tagging, lepton systematics, unfolding
results.notes: MCFM W+1j@NNLO prediction of 765 +26/-26 fb is in good agreement; Sherpa and MadGraph predictions have much larger scale uncertainties.
Dedicated to the >=2-jet selection and mjj-sensitive topology.
Sherpa QCD+EW gives 521 fb; MCFM W+1j@NNLO gives 530 fb before applying EW corrections.
Sherpa QCD prediction is 249 fb; MCFM W+1j@NNLO predicts 235 fb.

analysis_design_insights.description: The analysis partitions the boosted W+jets sample into collinear and back-to-back regions using the minimum separation between the lepton and the nearest jet above 100 GeV.
analysis_design_insights.reason_for_use: This directly isolates the enhanced phase space of real W emission from high-pT jets from more standard W+1 jet recoil topologies.

analysis_design_insights.description: Dominant ttbar, Z+jets, and multijet backgrounds are normalized using dedicated control regions rather than relying only on nominal simulation.
analysis_design_insights.reason_for_use: Reduces modeling bias in the high-momentum phase space where MC predictions can be inaccurate.
analysis_design_insights.special_considerations: ttbar and Z+jets corrections are parameterized in jet multiplicity; multijet corrections in lepton pT and eta.

analysis_design_insights.design_feature: Particle-level unfolding matched closely to detector-level phase space
analysis_design_insights.description: The fiducial particle-level selection mirrors the reconstruction-level region definitions and uses iterative Bayesian unfolding with two iterations.
analysis_design_insights.reason_for_use: Provides a robust measurement that is minimally extrapolated and suitable for theory comparison and future recasting.
analysis_design_insights.special_considerations: An underflow bin with 400 < leading-jet pT < 500 GeV is included to capture migration across the 500 GeV threshold.

analysis_design_insights.design_feature: Separate e and mu channels with correlated combination
analysis_design_insights.description: Electron and muon measurements are unfolded independently and then combined with a chi2 likelihood fit.
analysis_design_insights.reason_for_use: Preserves channel-specific detector effects while exploiting the common underlying physics for improved precision.
analysis_design_insights.special_considerations: Multijet uncertainties are treated as uncorrelated between channels because fake-lepton compositions differ.

sensitivity_drivers.dominant_signal_feature: Boosted leptonic W boson produced with a leading jet above 500 GeV and characteristic collinear or recoil topology encoded in DeltaRmin(l,jet100).
sensitivity_drivers.dominant_background_rejection_feature: Exactly one isolated lepton, b-jet veto, additional-lepton veto, and dedicated control-region normalization for ttbar, Z+jets, and multijet backgrounds.
sensitivity_drivers.main_limiting_systematics: Background modelling uncertainties from control-region normalization factors, JES/JER, and b-tagging.
